ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance Notice – 12th April 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

This is to inform you that the corporate VPN service will undergo maintenance from 02:00 AM to 04:00 AM IST on 12th April 2026. During this window, all remote connections will be unavailable. Please plan accordingly. For any urgent connections, contact the network team at <URL>.

Thank you,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – IT Helpdesk Ticket #56789
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected an unauthorized access attempt to your corporate account. Your IT ticket #56789 is now pending. To verify your identity and secure your account, please click the link below and enter your credentials:

<URL>

Failure to comply within 15 minutes will result in account lockout.

Kripya jaldi se action kare.

Regards,
IT Support Team
